original: Born out of wedlock to a successful notary and a lower-class woman in, or near, Vinci, he was educated in Florence by the Italian painter and sculptor Andrea del Verrocchio. He began his career in the city, but then spent much time in the service of Ludovico Sforza in Milan. Later, he worked in Florence and Milan again, as well as briefly in Rome, all while attracting a large following of imitators and students. Upon the invitation of Francis I, he spent his last three years in France, where he died in 1519.
child_friendly: Leonardo da Vinci was born in a small town in Italy. His father was a lawyer. His mother was a poor woman. Leonardo went to the city of Florence when he was young. He learned how to paint and make statues. He was a very good student. Later, he worked for powerful leaders in Milan and Rome. After that, the King of France invited him to stay in a beautiful castle. Leonardo lived in France for three years. He died there in the year 1519. Today, people all over the world still love him.
visual_description: I see a young man with paint on his hands in a bright studio. Sunlight comes through a tall window. Later, I see him walking in a huge stone castle. He has big papers with drawings of birds and machines. Finally, he is an old man with a long white beard. He sits in a quiet garden with green trees.

original: In today's rapidly evolving digital landscape, electric vehicles has become a focal point of discussion among industry professionals and everyday users alike. Many organizations are now investing heavily in electric vehicles infrastructure, recognizing its potential to streamline operations and enhance productivity. However, critics argue that the rapid pace of change leaves behind those who cannot adapt quickly enough.
child_friendly: Many people are talking about electric cars today. These cars use batteries, not gas. Many big companies are building places to charge these cars. They think electric cars are the future. Some people are worried because things are changing very fast. They think some people might not be able to keep up. But many people think electric cars will help us work better and save time.
visual_description: I see a shiny white car plugged into a tall post. There are no loud engine sounds. Then, I see a map with many blue dots. Each dot is a place where a car can get power. I see people smiling as they drive past a dusty gas station. The air looks very clear and blue.

original: Health and wellness have become central themes in contemporary society, with individuals increasingly seeking holistic approaches to maintaining physical and mental well-being. The program emphasizes the importance of balanced nutrition, regular physical activity, and mindfulness practices such as meditation and deep breathing exercises.
child_friendly: Being healthy is very important to people now. To be healthy, you need to eat good food like fruit and vegetables. You also need to move your body and exercise every day. It is also good to keep your mind calm. You can do this by sitting quietly and taking deep breaths. When you do these things, you feel happy and strong.
visual_description: I see a table with bright red apples and green salad. There is a person running on a path through a park. Later, I see a person sitting on the floor with their eyes closed. They look very calm. Their chest moves up and down slowly as they breathe.
